execution_loop.why: This is the current highest-priority operator-form change generated directly from ICSPB.
Update-law closure must now be driven by novelty-retention-switching stress rather than free update search.
Bridge-space is already filtered; the next move is dense dynamic closure rather than more symbolic search.
Brain-side work must move from executed probes to causal falsification.
The new modality-unified reasoning law should be threaded into readout, bridge, and brain-side tests.

shared_principle: Every engineering block must now declare which encoding-mechanism gap it attacks and which theoretical object it instantiates.

verdict.core_answer: Engineering and theory can now be tied together by one explicit encoding-mechanism closure loop.
verdict.next_engineering_target: run the first P3 operator benchmark under this joint loop and then update all other tracks against the same closure map.
